prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Integrated Urgent Care (IUC) framework is applicable in Scotland as it encompasses NHS 111 and Out of Hours services which operate across the UK, including Scotland. Additionally, the collection of IUC statistics is relevant for monitoring healthcare services and performance in all nations of the UK.
